claim: AI fluency is about how humans interact and collaborate with AI systems, not about AI as a technology—it focuses on effective, efficient, ethical, and safe engagement.
actionable: Develop AI fluency by focusing on your ability to work effectively with AI as a partner, not by learning AI technology in depth.
source_title: AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course Trailer

claim: Treating AI as a trusted partner for creative and innovative problem-solving is more valuable than treating it as an advanced spell-checker.
actionable: Approach AI collaboration as genuine problem-solving partnership, leveraging its capabilities for ideation and iteration rather than just polishing.
source_title: AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations Course Trailer
